name: UV Protection Sunglasses
description: Stylish UV protection sunglasses perfect for summer outings. Blocks 99% of UVA and UVB rays to protect your eyes while keeping you looking cool on the beach or in the city.

name: Beach Straw Hat
description: A wide-brim straw hat to shield you from the blazing sun. Lightweight, breathable, and perfect for the beach, poolside, or outdoor festivals.

name: SPF 50 Sunscreen Lotion
description: Dermatologist-approved SPF 50+ sunscreen that protects against UVA and UVB rays. Water-resistant formula, perfect for swimming and outdoor activities.

name: Lightweight Linen Shirt
description: Breathable linen shirt designed for hot summer days. Moisture-wicking fabric keeps you cool and comfortable whether you're at the beach or in the city.

name: Waterproof Beach Bag
description: Large waterproof tote bag with multiple compartments. Fits your towel, sunscreen, snacks, and more. Perfect companion for beach days and outdoor trips.

name: Aloe Vera After-Sun Gel
description: Soothing aloe vera gel to calm and hydrate sun-exposed skin. Provides instant relief from sunburn and keeps your skin moisturized all day long.

name: Flip Flop Sandals
description: Comfortable and durable flip flops with cushioned soles. Perfect for beach walks, poolside lounging, or casual summer outings.

name: Swim Shorts
description: Quick-dry swim shorts with elastic waistband and side pockets. Ideal for swimming, surfing, or casual beach wear.

name: Portable Beach Umbrella
description: Lightweight and sturdy beach umbrella with UV protection coating. Easy to set up and carry, provides excellent shade on sunny days.

name: Cooling Face Mist
description: Refreshing facial mist with rose water and hyaluronic acid. Instantly cools and hydrates skin during hot summer days.

name: Inflatable Pool Float
description: Giant inflatable pool float in fun summer shapes. Made from durable PVC, holds up to 200 lbs. Perfect for pool parties and lazy river days.

name: Tropical Print Dress
description: Flowy tropical print summer dress made from lightweight chiffon. Perfect for beach days, summer parties, or casual outings.

name: Waterproof Sunscreen Spray
description: Easy-to-apply spray sunscreen with SPF 70. Lightweight, non-greasy formula that dries instantly. Great for active outdoor days.

name: Snorkeling Set
description: Complete snorkeling set with anti-fog mask, dry-top snorkel, and adjustable fins. Explore the underwater world in crystal clear summer waters.

name: Woven Beach Bracelet
description: Handcrafted woven bracelet with vibrant summer colors. Water-resistant and adjustable, perfect for beach and festival looks.

name: Insulated Water Bottle
description: Double-wall insulated stainless steel water bottle that keeps drinks cold for 24 hours. Leak-proof lid and BPA-free. Essential for summer hydration.

name: Summer Espadrilles
description: Classic canvas espadrilles with jute soles. Lightweight and breathable, perfect for summer walks in the city or by the sea.

name: Vitamin C Face Serum
description: Brightening Vitamin C serum that fights sun damage and hyperpigmentation. Lightweight formula absorbs quickly for glowing summer skin.

name: Beach Volleyball
description: Official size and weight beach volleyball with soft touch cover. Water and sand resistant, perfect for beach tournaments and backyard fun.

name: Linen Wide-Leg Pants
description: Relaxed wide-leg linen pants that keep you cool and stylish. High-waisted with elastic back, pairs perfectly with any summer top.

name: Portable Mini Fan
description: Rechargeable portable mini fan with 3 speed settings. Compact and quiet, perfect for outdoor events, travel, and office use during summer.

name: Raffia Crossbody Bag
description: Stylish handwoven raffia crossbody bag with adjustable strap. Lightweight and chic — the perfect summer accessory for beach and market trips.

name: After-Sun Moisturizer
description: Deeply hydrating after-sun moisturizer with shea butter and vitamin E. Repairs and soothes sun-stressed skin overnight for a healthy summer glow.

name: Canvas Tote Bag
description: Durable canvas tote bag with summer print design. Spacious enough for groceries, beach essentials, or everyday use. Eco-friendly and reusable.
